token_semantics_findings.finding: Status coloring is centralized through existing dashboard CSS selectors.

component_api_findings.finding: Mission cards can accept additional small status text without a new component.

state_accessibility_coverage_findings.finding: Status text uses data-state attributes for styling.

drift_duplication_findings.finding: No duplicate runtime readiness component is needed.

migration_sequence: Keep runtime status in existing mission-card rows.
governance_checks: Search for unsupported one-off status colors before release.
